# IssuerBoundCredentials.Cimd property

`true` when these credentials are a CIMD: a portable self-hosted HTTPS-URL `client_id` with no per-issuer state, hence exempt from re-binding (R-23.16, CIMD exemption).

```csharp
public bool Cimd { get; set; }
```
